error_signature: Bad request: Webhook can be set up only on ports 80, 88, 443 or 8443
title: Webhook setup requires specific ports
symptom: When attempting to set up a webhook, n8n returns a 'Bad request' error indicating that the webhook can only be set up on specific ports.
applies_when: n8n is configured with a non-standard port
not_this_if: Webhook is set up on ports 80, 88, 443, or 8443
root_cause: n8n restricts webhook setups to certain ports for security and compatibility reasons. If the webhook is attempted on a different port, it results in a bad request error.
fix_steps: Set the n8n environment variable WEBHOOK_URL to a valid URL using one of the allowed ports
Restart n8n to apply the changes
agent_instruction: Configure the WEBHOOK_URL environment variable to use an allowed port and restart n8n.
